description_long: This house features a modern, minimalist design with clean lines and a flat roof profile. The structure is composed of two main rectangular volumes, one larger and one smaller, connected by a broad patio area. Large glass windows and sliding doors are visible along the longer facade, allowing for ample natural light and seamless indoor-outdoor flow. A spacious swimming pool is integrated into the patio, bordered by light-colored paving. The exterior materials appear to be a combination of concrete, glass, and metal, with subtle color contrasts between the roof, walls, and window frames. The overall layout emphasizes open space, geometric simplicity, and a strong connection to outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large glass windows, a spacious patio, and an integrated swimming pool, featuring minimalist lines and light-colored materials.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade with large windows, the main entrance, and the full expanse of the pool and patio.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the pool, the smaller building volume, and the overhanging roof sections.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the long, continuous roofline, secondary entrance or service area, and the pool's position relative to the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool, the smaller structure, and the open patio area.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows in horizontal bands, asymmetrical placement
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wide glass door with a flat overhang, flush with the patio, and minimal decorative elements.
